mac-cheese-by-terry-crews-mack-and-jeezy.name: Mac & Cheese By Terry Crews (mack And Jeezy)
instructions: Cook macaroni “al dente” according to package directions. Drain with cold water.
Preheat oven to 177°C (180°C).
In a bowl, combine cottage cheese, cheese, sour cream, egg, and salt. Fold in macaroni.
Grease a 2-quart (2 liters) casserole dish with coconut oil.
Spoon mixture into casserole dish and sprinkle with extra cheese and paprika.
Bake for 45 minutes.
Enjoy!

mae-rose-cocktail.name: Mae Rose Cocktail

ingredients.prep: such as Combier Créme de Pamplemousse Rose

instructions: Combine gin, vermouth, Campari, and grapefruit liqueur in a cocktail shaker and fill with ice. Stir until shaker is frosty, about 30 seconds. Strain into a coupe glass and garnish with a grapefruit twist.

maiale-al-latte-milk-braised-pork.name: Maiale Al Latte (milk-braised Pork)

ingredients.prep: boneless pork shoulder, cut into two 2-lb. pieces

ingredients.item: Sage (about 20 leaves) or a mix of rosemary sprigs
Chiles de árbol or  0.75 tsp. crushed red pepper flakes

instructions: Season pork generously with salt all over. Let sit at room temperature at least 1 hour, or preferably chill overnight, then let sit at room temperature 1 hour before cooking.

Preheat oven to 300°. Heat oil in a large Dutch oven or heavy wide saucepan over medium-high. Add garlic, cut sides down, and cook until golden brown, about 1 minute. Transfer garlic to a plate. Add pork to pot and cook, undisturbed, until golden brown, 3–5 minutes. Turn and cook, reducing heat to medium if needed so it doesn't burn, until golden brown on all sides, another 3–5 minutes.

Return pork and garlic to pot. Add milk, sage, chiles, and lemon peel. Transfer pot to oven and bake, uncovered, turning pork every 30 minutes, until meat is very tender and can easily be pierced with a paring knife and milk has reduced and formed curds, 2½–3 hours. Transfer meat to a cutting board and let rest 15 minutes.
Using a spoon, skim off most of the fat from the braising liquid; discard sage and lemon peel. Taste sauce and season with salt, if desired.
Slice pork and transfer to a platter. Arrange roasted garlic alongside pork, if desired. Spoon sauce over. Top with parsley; season with pepper.

make-a-caprese-wrap-with-mozzarella-and-.name: Make A Caprese Wrap With Mozzarella And Tomato At Home
make-a-caprese-wrap-with-mozzarella-and-.original_name: Haz en casa un wrap caprese con mozzarella y tomate
instructions: Extiende las tortillas y unta una fina capa de pesto en cada una.
Coloca rodajas de mozzarella uniformemente sobre la superficie.
Add tomato cuts and basil leaves to your taste.
Dig and pepper with extra virgin olive oil.
Envuelve los ingredientes formando un wrap, ajusta bien y corta por la mitad. Si deseas, puedes calentar cada lado del wrap en una plancha por un minuto. Esta parte es opcional.

make-these-cream-scallops-comedera.name: Make These Cream Scallops

100 ml de nata o crema de leche

Take your mushrooms that are clear and put them to paddle in the same pan. Cooking till sealed.
Add brandy with care and mix with mushrooms and cook until some evaporate.
Agrega la nata de a poco, un poco de sal y pimienta al gusto, mezcla hasta que todo se integre.

It takes the oven and kitchen for 170 ° C for about 40 minutes.
After that time, your cake should be well curved and super ready.
Apaga, deja reposar y desmolda. Corta en rebanadas y disfruta.
That's good!

make-this-delicious-asian-soy-dressing-t.name: Make This Delicious Asian Soy Dressing To Enhance The Flavors
make-this-delicious-asian-soy-dressing-t.original_name: Haz este delicioso aderezo asiático y soja para realzar los sabores

Agrega el jengibre rallado y los ajos picados a la mezcla.
Revolves the mixture well until the sugar completely dissolve.
Sprinkle the roasted sesame seeds and green onion onto the mixture and remove again.

mango-jalapeno-salsa.name: Mango Jalapeno Salsa
instructions: Mix salsa ingredients together in a bowl.
In a separate bowl, stir together the dressing ingredients. Then, pour dressing over salsa and mix together.
Serve with tortilla chips.

mango-mousse-argiro.name: Mango Mousse

ingredients.item: 3 ripe mangoes + a few extra slices for garnishing
2 tablespoons of stevia or other sweetening matter
3 ripe mangoes + a few extra slices for garnishing
2 tablespoons of stevia or other sweetening matter

instructions: Soak the gelatin in a bowl with cold water and allow it to soak for 10 minutes.
Clean the mangoes and mash them in the blender.
Add the pureed fruits into a small pot, add the stevia and heat them on low heat until the sweetener dissolves.
Drain the gelatines and add them to the pot by mixing the mixture with quick moves. Remove from heat and allow it to cool for a few minutes.
Beat the cream with the wire in the mixer until it becomes viscous.
Add the yogurt and mix.
Finally, incorporate the mango mixture gently stirring to homogenize.
Divide the mousse into five glasses and freeze it in the refrigerator for a few hours.
Garnish with mango slices and enjoy

mango-peach-and-pineapple-salsa.name: Mango, Peach, And Pineapple Salsa

ingredients.prep: halved, pitted, and cut into 1/2-inch dice

instructions: Place mangos, peaches, tomatoes, onion, red pepper, yellow pepper, pineapple, and cilantro in a large bowl. Stir in water, sugar, lime juice, jalapeño, garlic, and salt until well combined.
For best flavor, cover and refrigerate until chilled before serving.

mangonada.name: Mangonada

ingredients.item: One 1kg (35.27-ounce) package frozen alphonso mango pulp or one 850g (30-ounce) can alphonso mango pulp or 1 1/2 pints mango sorbet

instructions: {'step': '1', 'text': 'If Using Frozen Mango Pulp: Remove frozen pulp from its packaging and, using a sharp chef\\u2019s knife, cut it into roughly 2-inch chunks. Transfer frozen chunks to a high-powered blender or food processor along with the 1/4 cup lime juice and pulse until a smooth, sorbet-like puree forms; you may need to use your blender\\u2019s tamper (if it has one) and/or stop to mix and scrape down the sides as needed to fully break up all the frozen chunks. If your blender or food processor is struggling, let the frozen puree stand until slightly softened to make processing easier, as you do not want to damage your equipment by forcing it beyond its capabilities.'}

{'step': '2', 'text': 'If Using Canned Mango Pulp: If using canned mango pulp, open the can, then either churn the pulp in an ice cream maker with the 1/4 cup lime juice until a sorbet-like texture forms or transfer to the freezer until pulp is almost completely frozen, about 8 hours, then transfer to a blender or food processor and process with the 1/4 cup lime juice until a smooth, sorbet-like texture forms. Do not freeze an unopened can, as it can rupture from the expanding contents (note that stirring occasionally during freezing will help form the sorbet-like texture and may help avoid the need to process the frozen pulp at all).'}
{'step': '3', 'text': 'If Using Mango Sorbet: Using a food processor or blender, combine sorbet and the 1/4 cup lime juice and process/blend until well incorporated.'}

manitou-stew-with-dumplings.name: Manitou Stew With Dumplings

ingredients.prep: white and pale green parts only, halved lengthwise, thinly sliced into half-moons
peeled, seeds removed, cut into 1 0.5" cubes
skin and bones removed, flesh broken into pieces

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Heat ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over low until shimmering. Add 1 Tbsp. herbes de Provence and 1 tsp. crushed red pepper flakes and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 20 seconds. Add 6 oil-packed anchovy fillets and cook, stirring, until dissolved, about 1 minute. Add 2 medium onions, finely chopped, 2 medium leeks, white and pale green parts only, halved lengthwise, thinly sliced into half-moons, 6 celery stalks, sliced crosswise ½" thick, and 6 garlic cloves, finely chopped, and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened but not completely tender, 6–8 minutes; season with kosher salt and finely ground black pepper.

Add 3 Tbsp. all-purpose flour and cook, stirring constantly, until vegetables are coated, about 1 minute. Pour in 2 cups dry white wine, scraping up browned bits stuck to bottom of pot, and cook, stirring occasionally, until a thick sauce forms and no lumps remain, about 3 minutes. Add 1 lb. butternut squash, peeled, seeds removed, cut into 1½" cubes, 1 lb. rutabaga or kohlrabi, peeled, cut into 1½" cubes, 1 lb. Yukon Gold potatoes (4–5 medium), scrubbed, cut into 1½" cubes, and one 14.5-oz. can diced tomatoes and stir to combine; season with salt and black pepper. Pour in 4 cups low-sodium vegetable broth and 1 cup water and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer 20 minutes. Stir in 1 lb. smoked trout or whitefish, skin and bones removed, flesh broken into pieces.

While the stew is simmering, whisk 1½ cups (188 g) all-purpose flour, 1 oz. Parmesan, finely grated (about ½ cup), 1 Tbsp. sugar, 2 tsp. baking powder, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, 1 tsp. freshly ground pepper, ½ tsp. caraway seeds, and 2 Tbsp. chopped dill in a medium bowl to combine. Pour in 1¼ cups buttermilk and mix just until dough comes together (be careful not to overmix).

Just after adding fish to stew, drop dough into stew by the tablespoonful (don’t worry if dumplings aren’t perfect; they will puff up as they cook). Reduce heat to low, cover pot, and cook until dumplings are opaque and 3 times larger in size (they should cover most of the surface of the stew; uncover to check), 18–22 minutes. To be extra sure, you can remove a dumpling and cut it in half; the interior should look like a soft dinner roll and be completely cooked through. If they’re not, re-cover pot and cook, checking every 2 minutes, until done.
To serve, ladle stew and dumplings into bowls and top with more dill.

maritime-donair-sauce.name: Maritime Donair Sauce
instructions: Whisk condensed milk, vinegar, and garlic powder together in a small bowl until well combined.
For best flavor results, refrigerate the sauce for at least 1 hour before using.

marshmallow-peanut-butter-banana-dip.name: Marshmallow-peanut Butter-banana Dip
instructions: {'step': '1', 'text': 'Combine cream cheese and peanut butter in a bowl and beat with a hand mixer until smooth, about 1 minute.'}
{'step': '2', 'text': 'Stir in marshmallow cream, mashed banana, and vanilla extract and whip until well combined.'}

marys-panna-cotta-with-red-wine-syrup.name: Mary's Panna Cotta With Red Wine Syrup
instructions: Submerge the gelatin in an ice bath for 10 minutes, then drain well. In a small saucepan, bring the cream to a light simmer over medium heat. Add the drained gelatin to the pan with the cream (still over heat) and whisk in the sugar. Cook for 2 minutes until the sugar is fully dissolved. In a bowl, combine the kefir and labneh, then add the warm cream mixture to the bowl and combine until fully incorporated. Pour this mixture into eight 6-ounce ramekins or custard molds. Allow it to set in the refrigerator overnight.

Pour the bottle of wine into a small, heavy-bottomed pot and add the honey and black pepper. Cook the wine until all the alcohol is gone and it is reduced to a thick syrup. Pour the syrup through a fine-mesh sieve into a bowl to remove the pepper. Refrigerate the syrup until you are ready to garnish the panna cotta.

Remove the panna cotta from the refrigerator 15 minutes before serving. Fill a bowl with hot tap water and dip each panna cotta mold into the water, then turn out onto individual plates. Garnish with sliced peaches and pomegranate seeds (arils) and drizzle with the red wine syrup.

mashed-potatoes-au-gratin-argiro.name: Mashed Potatoes Au Gratin
instructions: Clean and cut the potatoes into pieces. Place them in a pot, cover with water and add salt after boiling.
Boil for 20-25 minutes until softened.
Drain the potatoes in a colander and put them back in the pot over low heat.
Press them with potato press or wire, removing all the moisture left and pulping them simultaneously.
Add the butter pieces and cream to the mashed potatoes. Mix until homogenized.
Add the fresh cream cheese and grated hard cheese. Mix well and control the salt. Finish with freshly ground pepper and some nutmeg.
In a buttered baking pan of 30×20 cm, spread half the chewed potatoes.
Sprinkle with half the mozzarella and finely chopped dried fruit.
Cover with the rest of the mashed potatoes and sprinkle with the rest of the mozzarella.
Place the baking pan on the middle grill of the oven and bake in a well preheated oven at 180.3.3. in the air for 20 minutes, until the surface is ground.
Sprinkle with some chopped chives for freshness and serve warm.
It accompanies perfect pork roll.

instructions: Rub the onions first and drain them.
Add all the ingredients for the meatballs: minced meat, onion, garlic, tomato, cumin, mint, salt, pepper, flour and knead.
Create and fry in a large, deep pan for 2-3 minutes the meatballs.
Add the grated tomato, herbs and spices and as soon as the sauce boils, boil for 10 minutes.
Boil the pasta and pour them into the sauce as they drip. Boil hard for 1 minutes.
Garnish with fresh mint and grated head cheese.

mediterranean-vegetables.name: Mediterranean Vegetables

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet and cook onion until soft and translucent, about 5 minutes. Add carrots, bell peppers, and fennel; cook, stirring occasionally, until softened but still firm to the bite, 5 to 10 minutes. Season with Italian herbs, salt, and pepper.

melon-bavaroise-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Melon Bavaroise Recipe
instructions: Drain the gelatin leaves in cold water. Beat the yolks with sugar until you get a very cute cream. Beat the cream until it's firm and set aside in the cold.
Light a pot with water and melon pulp and let it boil. Remove from the flame, add the gelatine sheets and let it cool slightly.

Add to the gem preparation the previous mixture, in yarn and always stirring. Finally, it wraps the whipped cream, pours in a form, previously greased with oil and leads to cold for about 6 hours. Disfigure and serve with decor to taste.

melted-snowman-cookie.name: Melted Snowman Cookie
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Beat butter in a bowl using an electric mixer until fluffy, about 2 minutes. Beat white sugar, baking powder, and salt into butter until just combined. Beat egg, milk, and vanilla extract into butter-sugar mixture; add flour and mix until dough is just combined. Cover bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate until dough is slightly chilled, about 10 minutes.
Scoop dough into balls slightly larger than golf balls; flatten into cookies. Arrange cookies on a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until edges are golden brown, 10 to 20 minutes. Cool on baking sheet for about 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely, at least 30 minutes.
Butter a microwave-safe plate. Place marshmallows on the prepared plate.
Microwave marshmallows until slightly puffed, 10 to 15 seconds. Gently press marshmallows until bottoms slightly ooze.
Whisk confectioners' sugar and water together in a bowl until icing is slightly thicker than drizzle-consistency. Pour icing over cookies so it runs over the edges, reserving about 1 tablespoon.
Melt chocolate chips in a microwave-safe glass or ceramic bowl, about 30 seconds. Pour melted chocolate into a piping bag with a small tip or a plastic bag with a corner snipped.
Press 1 marshmallow close to an edge of each cookie to be the snowman's head. Draw 'stick arms' onto the icing using the melted chocolate.

Divide the reserved 1 tablespoon icing into 2 small bowls. Mix red food coloring into 1 of the bowls and orange food coloring into the other bowl. Decorate the snowmen with scarves or ties using the red icing and yellow icing.

migas-fried-rice.name: Migas Fried Rice

ingredients.item: Dried guajillo or new mexican chile

ingredients.prep: trimmed, tough outer layer removed, thinly sliced

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Fresh cilantro leaves with tender stems

instructions: Roast onion, tomatillo, and jalapeño over a gas burner, turning often, until charred and blistered in spots, about 5 minutes. (Alternatively, broil on a broiler-proof rimmed baking sheet, turning often, 8–10 minutes.)

Meanwhile, toast guajillo chile in a small dry skillet until puffed and fragrant, about 30 seconds per side. Chop chile (with seeds) and transfer to a food processor. Add garlic and lemongrass and pulse to a coarse paste.

Add fish sauce, lime juice, soy sauce, brown sugar, cumin, onion, tomatillo, and jalapeño. Pulse to a coarse purée; season with more fish sauce and lime juice, if desired (mixture should be salty and flavorful).
DO AHEAD: Jaew can be made 1 day ahead. Let cool; cover and chill.

Heat oil in a large wok or skillet over medium-high heat. Add tortillas and cook, stirring occasionally, until golden brown and crisp, about 2 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer chips to paper towels to drain. (Alternatively, use store-bought corn chips.)

Increase heat to high and add onion and jalapeño to same wok; season with salt and pepper. Cook, stirring often, until softened and fragrant, about 2 minutes. Add eggs and cook, stirring constantly, until fluffy and just set, about 1 minute. Add rice and cook, stirring often, until rice is evenly coated and beginning to brown, about 4 minutes.
Add jaew and cook, stirring occasionally, until fragrant and paste reduces slightly, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat and mix in cheddar and half of fried tortillas.
Serve fried rice topped with scallions, cilantro, hot sauce, MSG (if using), and remaining fried tortillas.

milk-and-cheese-pastry-lezzet.name: Milk And Cheese Pastry
instructions: 1. Mix the Maydanosis with the shore and lor cheese.

11. 11. Serve hot or warm.

mini-lemon-mascarpone-cheesecakes.name: Mini Lemon Mascarpone Cheesecakes
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C. Lightly oil two 12-cup muffin tins. Cut parchment paper into twenty-four 5x1-inch strips and place one strip in each cup so it runs down the center.
In a medium bowl, combine graham cracker crumbs and butter and divide evenly between the muffin tins. Press the crust firmly into the bottom of the muffin cups.

In a large bowl, beat together cream cheese, mascarpone, eggs, lemon zest, lemon juice, Sugar In The Raw®, Stevia In The Raw®, and vanilla until completely smooth. Divide cheese mixture between muffin cups.

Bake cheesecakes until set, about 25 minutes, rotating the pans in the oven halfway through baking. Let cool completely in the pans, then use the parchment strips to lift the cheesecakes out. Refrigerate to chill completely.

mini-shrimp-rolls.name: Mini Shrimp Rolls

ingredients.prep: each about 1 1/2 x 1 1/2-inch; such as Martin's potato rolls or King's Hawaiian

ingredients.item: Celery leaves or crushed potato chips

instructions: Bring a large saucepan of water to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low; season lightly with salt. When water is at a gentle simmer, add shrimp. Poach until just opaque in the center, 2–4 minutes. Drain; transfer shrimp to a medium bowl of ice water to cool. Drain; wipe out bowl.

Whisk mayonnaise, celery, chives, oil, lemon juice, and horseradish in a medium bowl to blend; season to taste with salt and pepper. Chop shrimp into small pieces (about 1/3-inch); add to bowl with mayonnaise mixture. Stir to coat. DO AHEAD Shrimp salad can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

Preheat oven to 375°. Using a small serrated knife, make a 1/2-inch-deep cut across the top of each dinner roll and gently pry open roll with your fingers to create a mini New England–style hot dog bun. Lightly brush inside of rolls with butter; place on a rimmed baking sheet. Toast until light golden, about 8 minutes. Let cool slightly.
Divide shrimp mixture among rolls, pressing into cut across top; garnish with celery leaves or crushed potato chips.

mint-syrup.name: Mint Syrup
instructions: Combine water, sugar, and mint leaves in a small saucepan. Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring until sugar dissolves. Simmer for 1 minute; remove from heat and let syrup steep, about 30 minutes.
Pour syrup into a sterilized glass jar through a mesh strainer to remove mint leaves; let cool.

mixed-citrus-gratin.name: Mixed Citrus "gratin
instructions: Prepare the grapefruit: Slice off the bottom and top of one grapefruit, cutting just past the white pith to expose the fruit underneath.

Peel the grapefruit: Stand the grapefruit upright on one flat end. Using a small, thin knife, remove the peel and white pith in sections, cutting down the sides from top to bottom and rotating the grapefruit as you go.
Segment the grapefruit: Working over a medium bowl, cut along either side of the membranes to release the segments. Discard the membranes.
Repeat for remaining citrus: Repeat the peeling and segmenting process with the remaining grapefruit and the two oranges.
Prepare for brûlée: Using a slotted spoon, transfer the grapefruit and orange segments to a small rimmed baking sheet. Sprinkle them evenly with demerara sugar and salt.
Brûlée the citrus: Using a kitchen torch, brûlée the sugar until it is melted, bubbling, and the segments are caramelized, about 2 minutes. Let cool.
Prepare the lime: While the brûléed citrus cools, slice off the bottom and top of the lime, cutting just past the white pith to expose the fruit.

Peel the lime: Stand the lime upright on one flat end. Using a small, thin knife, remove the peel and white pith in sections, cutting down the sides from top to bottom and rotating the lime as you go.

Segment and chop the lime: Working over a small bowl, cut along either side of the membranes to release the segments. Discard the membranes. Pat the lime segments dry with paper towels, then coarsely chop them.
Prepare the basil: Stack the basil leaves and gently roll them up into a cylinder.
Chiffonade the basil: Slice the basil cylinder crosswise with a rocking motion to make thin ribbons.
Arrange and serve: Transfer the brûléed grapefruit and orange segments to a platter. Serve topped with the chopped lime segments and basil ribbons.

mixed-olive-vinaigrette.name: Mixed Olive Vinaigrette

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Whisk shallot, green and Kalamata olives, basil, oil, and vinegar in a medium bowl; season with salt and pepper.

mouthwatering-chicken.name: Mouthwatering Chicken

ingredients.prep: trimmed, cut into thirds, smashed with the back of a knife

ingredients.item: (packed) fresh cilantro leaves with tender stems

instructions:
Season chicken with 2 Tbsp. salt; let stand for 15 minutes. Bring remaining 3 Tbsp. salt, ginger, scallions, and 4 quarts water to a boil in a large pot; add chicken. Reduce heat to medium-low; simmer for 8 minutes. Remove from heat; let stand for 20 minutes.
Do ahead: Can be made 1 day ahead. Transfer chicken to a medium bowl. Add poaching liquid to cover by 1". Cover and chill chicken. Reserve ½ cup poaching liquid.

Heat chili oil in a medium skillet over medium heat. Add cumin, fennel, and peppercorns; fry, stirring often, until fragrant, 1–2 minutes. Add scallions, chiles, ginger, and sugar; cook, stirring often, until fragrant, about 2 minutes. Stir in reserved ½ cup liquid from poached chicken, soy sauce, garlic, vinegar, and fish sauce. Transfer to a small bowl and let cool.
Do ahead: Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.
Remove chicken from poaching liquid. Thinly slice. Toss lettuce, sprouts, and cilantro in a large bowl to combine. Divide among plates. Arrange sliced chicken over. Drizzle with numbing vinaigrette.

ms-piggies-coconut-ice-cream.name: Ms Piggie's Coconut Ice Cream
instructions: Place coconut cream, heavy cream, whole milk, and sugar in the jar of an electric blender; blend on medium speed for 2 minutes.
Freeze cream mixture in an ice cream maker according to manufacturer's instructions.

mumbo-sauce.name: Mumbo Sauce

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Whisk 1 cup ketchup, ½ cup distilled white vinegar, ½ cup (packed) dark brown sugar, ¼ cup soy sauce, 2 Tbsp. hot sauce, 2 Tbsp. pineapple juice, 2 tsp. sweet paprika, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, 1 tsp. freshly ground white pepper, and 1 tsp. garlic powder in a medium saucepan until smooth.

Place pan over medium-low heat and bring mixture to a simmer, whisking occasionally. Cook, whisking often, until sauce is thickened, about 5 minutes. Let cool, whisking occasionally to prevent a skin from forming.
Do Ahead: Sauce can be made 2 weeks ahead. Cover and refrigerate in an airtight container.

mushroom-baton-meatballs-lezzet.name: Mushroom Baton Meatballs
instructions: 1. Take a large roughness to the ground.
2. Salt, pepper, cumin, fresh onion, boiled bread, eggs and 2 tablespoons of oil and thoroughly knead.
3. Shake the water in high fire with the remaining fat, with little chopped.
4. After cooling, add and stir to the mink.
5. Place the baton cake mold into the mixture of oily paper and mink.
6. Spread the chopped peanuts on it and cook until the oven, set to 200 degrees.
7. Serve and serve.

mushroom-couscous-pilaf-recipe-lezzet.name: Mushroom Couscous Pilaf Recipe

ingredients.item: 3 cups hot water or vegetable/tavuk suy  u
Small pasteequalities (mini pony, mini letter cake)
Green onion (can be added at the end stage)
1k spoon butter + olive oil mixtur for improved flavor Home
Meat water(especially recommended for a more aromatic rice. Home
1 cup of cream (a softer for sleeping)

instructions: 1. Take olive oil and butter to the pan.
2. After molten add chopped onion and roast until soften.
3. Add sliced mushroom to the onion.
4. Shake the water and put it in the middle fire until it is possible.
5. Add mushrooms to the cookware after cooking.
6. Mix 1–2 minutes.
7. U add hot water orescent/tavuk water to your car.
8. Salt and pepper.
9. Bake about 10–12 minutes until the cockroach softens in the cliff fire.
10. Close the oven and rest 5 minutes by closing the cover of the pot.
11. 11. Depending on request & add fine chopped parsley to the car and serve hot.
12.  Afiyet olsun.

mushroom-quiche-with-peas-and-goat-chees.name: Mushroom Quiche With Peas And Goat Cheese
mushroom-quiche-with-peas-and-goat-chees.original_name: Quiche de cogumelos com ervilhas e queijo de cabra
instructions: Wash and laminate the mushrooms; peel and pinch the onion and garlic. Light a frying pan with some olive oil and saute the onion and garlic. Then add the mushrooms, season with the sweet pepper, salt and pepper and let cook a few minutes. Then add the peas, wrap and let it boil. Remove from the fire and reserve.
Bata os ovos numa tigela, junte as natas e tempere com um pouco de sal e pimenta. Reserve.

Line a tart (about 24 cm in diameter) with the broken mass. Fill it with the mushroom and pea preparation, spreading right through the bottom. Sprinkle with grated cheese and water with the egg mix. Cut the goat cheese into thick slices and spread over the quiche surface.
Take it in the oven, preheated to 180oC, for about 45 minutes or until the eggs solidify and the dough is toasty. Take it off and let it cool. Deform, decorate with fresh basil leaves and serve.

mustard-crystal-lezzet.name: Mustard Crystal

ingredients.item: 3 big-sized meat ( peeled and small cube shaped springs)

instructions: 1. Melt the butter in a pan and cook with adding and stirring tomatoes.
2. Wash the billurs and add it to chop and tomatoes.
3. Taste salt and pepper, add hard and mix.
4.   Bake the juice of the mates to the water of the orphans.
5. Transfer from January to the service plate and serve by reindeer of the baker cheese.

muzs-drop-sugar-cookies.name: Muz's Drop Sugar Cookies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).

Sift flour, salt, and baking soda together in a bowl. Beat 1 ½ cups sugar, butter, shortening, and vanilla extract together in a separate bowl until thoroughly combined. Add egg; beat until creamy. Stir sugar mixture into flour mixture until smooth; stir in milk.
Drop teaspoonsfuls of dough onto a baking sheet; flatten with the bottom of a water glass. Sprinkle tops of cookies with enough sugar to cover cookies entirely.
Bake in the preheated oven until lightly browned around edges, 10 to 12 minutes.

25-minute-scalloped-potatoes.name: 25-minute Scalloped Potatoes
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C.
Mix together all the ingredients and place in an oven-safe baking or casserole dish.
Bake for 25 minutes then remove from oven.
Sprinkle the potatoes with cheddar cheese and place back in the oven for five minutes, until melted.
Serve and enjoy!
